title: fetch_session URL joins via format\! relying on url::Url trailing slash
description: client.rs line 106: format\!("{}.well-known/jmap", self.base_url) works only because url::Url Display always appends a trailing '/' for origin-only URLs, making the result 'https://host/.well-known/jmap'. This is an implicit contract on url::Url Display that is not visible at the call site. A reader must know url crate internals to confirm correctness. Suggested rewrite: use self.base_url.join(".well-known/jmap").expect("static path is valid").to_string() or self.base_url.as_str().trim_end_matches('/').to_string() + "/.well-known/jmap". The join approach makes the intent unambiguous and survives any future change to the path validation.
close_reason: ixld.10 already documents the url::Url trailing-slash join behavior as a known decision. ixld.11 is redundant.
